task-gen.description: Computer-use task synthesis expert. Brainstorms and generates diverse, evaluable task datasets for CUA post-training from a user prompt. Uses web research + domain expertise to produce structured task sets with instructions, context/ground-truth, and difficulty distribution.

orchestrator.description: Orchestrator agent. Prepares environment, spawns setup-gen and reward-gen agents in adversarial loop, monitors agreement conditions, and outputs final verified task environments. Does NOT generate scripts itself.

setup-gen.description: Setup generation agent (Generator). Creates initial files and golden files via Python scripts within the adversarial loop. Reads REVIEW.md feedback from reward-gen and iterates until agreement.

reward-gen.description: Reward verification agent (Discriminator). Generates reward scripts with progressive 0.0-1.0 scoring, tests against golden and initial files, and writes structured REVIEW.md verdicts.
